content: you sure you test backend completely using curl commands

think({"thought":"PLAN: Complete Backend Testing with Curl Commands

PHASE 1: Review Current State
- Check existing backend files (models, views, serializers)
- Verify all endpoints are properly configured
- Identify what still needs testing

PHASE 2: Test Product CRUD Operations
Step 1: Test Product List - Output: curl GET /api/products/
Step 2: Test Product Detail - Output: curl GET /api/products/{id}/
Step 3: Test Product Create - Output: curl POST /api/products/
Step 4: Test Product Update - Output: curl PUT/PATCH /api/products/{id}/
Step 5: Test Product Delete - Output: curl DELETE /api/products/{id}/

PHASE 3: Test Category CRUD Operations
Step 6: Test Category List - Output: curl GET /api/categories/
Step 7: Test Category Create - Output: curl POST /api/categories/
Step 8: Test Category Update - Output: curl PUT/PATCH /api/categories/{id}/
Step 9: Test Category Delete - Output: curl DELETE /api/categories/{id}/

PHASE 4: Test Order Operations
Step 10: Test Order Create (with auth token) - Output: curl POST /api/orders/create_order/
Step 11: Test Order List (with auth token) - Output: curl GET /api/orders/
Step 12: Test Order Detail (with auth token) - Output: curl GET /api/orders/{id}/

PHASE 5: Test Auth Operations
Step 13: Test Logout - Output: curl POST /api/auth/logout/
Step 14: Test Token Refresh - Output: curl POST /api/auth/token/refresh/

PHASE 6: Test Cart Operations with Auth
Step 15: Test Cart Add with Auth - Output: curl POST /api/cart/add_item/ (with token)
Step 16: Test Cart Get with Auth - Output: curl GET /api/cart/items/ (with token)
Step 17: Test Cart Update with Auth - Output: curl PUT /api/cart/update_item/ (with token)
Step 18: Test Cart Remove with Auth - Output: curl DELETE /api/cart/remove_item/ (with token)

PHASE 7: Test Error Cases
Step 19: Test 404 errors - Output: curl GET /api/nonexistent/
Step 20: Test Validation errors - Output: curl POST /api/products/ (invalid data)
Step 21: Test Unauthorized access - Output: curl GET /api/products/ (without token)

PHASE 8: Document Results
- Create test-report.md with all curl commands and results
- Mark each test as PASS/FAIL
- Identify any issues that need fixing

After all tests pass, proceed to frontend development."})</arg_value>I need to complete the backend testing with curl commands. Let me continue testing the remaining endpoints.
